name: getnote
tagline: ClawHub (66★): 得到大脑（Get笔记）- 保存、搜索、管理个人笔记和知识库。 **当以下情况时使用此 Skill**： (1) 用户要保存内容到笔记：发链接、发图片、说「记一下」「存到笔记」「保存」「收藏」 (2) 用户要搜索或查看笔记：「搜一下」「找找笔记」「最
verdict: Hygiene undermines an otherwise decent skill: its name contains CJK characters and full-width parentheses, failing the basic kebab-case naming dispatch tooling expects. It also gives no scope boundaries and tracks no version history.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill exclusions appear anywhere in the description or body.
name is not kebab-case (^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$) — contains CJK characters and full-width parentheses.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
